web.title: Measurements - Roofr
web.description: Get your free Roofr Measurement Report. We're giving away a free Measurement Report to all QXO customers. Fill in the form below to claim yours.
web.markdown:
#### Roofr Report

[Download](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852ea1f_Roofr%20Report%20-%20Sample%20Report.pdf)

[![Roofr company logo with a white roof icon on a blue rounded square background next to the word 'roofr' in dark letters.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852e844_Roofr-Logo-Colour_Dark%402x.webp)![Roofr logo.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6703e6f537b701d10237be7d_Roofr%20Logo%20Full.svg)](https://roofr.com/)

![Roofr Logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/68c0780b9c9559e138532993_roofr-logo.avif)

![QXO logo.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6839edda0b249f6e9293a659_QXO_logo-blue.webp)

# Get your free Roofr Measurement Report

Roofr Reports are known for their speed and accuracy. Order a report in 60 seconds or less and get it in as little as 2 hours, your first one’s on us!

[Order a FREE report](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#free-report)

View sample report

[View sample report](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852ea1f_Roofr%20Report%20-%20Sample%20Report.pdf)

![Roofing professional standing on a roof under repair, with a digital Roofr report displayed on a smartphone screen. The report shows an aerial view of a residential property and a roof diagram, indicating key measurements and details about the roof.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/66f6c5ac53c642f8eab85d74_roofr-measurements%20(1).avif)

# Measurements you can trust to be accurate

![Roofr Measurement Reports.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/679d1413496d6c73654b5efe_REPORTS%20OG%20TAG.avif)

Roofr Reports: Full Roof Measurement Reports for Only $13

Roofr

0:00 / 0:00

[Order a FREE report](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#free-report)

View sample report

[View sample report](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852ea1f_Roofr%20Report%20-%20Sample%20Report.pdf)

## Get your free Roofr Measurement Report

We’re giving away a free Measurement Report to all QXO customers. Fill in the form below to claim yours.

First name\*

Last name\*

Email\*

Phone number\*

Company name\*

Roofr values your privacy. We’ll only use your information to manage your account and to provide the products and services you request. We may occasionally contact you by email and SMS for meeting reminders, updates, and information we think may be useful to you. You can unsubscribe anytime. See our [Privacy Policy](http://roofr.com/privacy) and [Terms & Conditions](http://roofr.com/terms) for more information.

- I agree to receive communications from Roofr

Partner Name

Partner Type

Partner Referral Source

UTM Campaign

UTM Medium

UTM Source

![Screenshot of the Roofr x ABC Supply report.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/672e61901ce03f31f19d85b5_roofr-abc-supply-modal.webp)

## Take your work to the next level with Roofr + QXO

Roofr is the only CRM whose measurement reports and proposals are built to work together. With the QXO.com integration you can order a report, create a proposal, and send a material order without skipping a beat. You’ll save time, minimize errors, and keep your projects on track and on budget.

[Get started](https://app.roofr.com/dashboard/settings/integrations) [Get more info](https://roofr.com/qxo-talk-to-an-expert)

Proposals

## Accurate pricing in an instant

Bid farewell to blindspots by keeping track of pending requests and outstanding balances at a glance.

Plus! No more manual reconciliations – our system seamlessly matches deposited funds and individual transaction statuses on your dashboard. You get visibility on your cashflow, without the hassle.

![Included](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852e6d8_fi_check-blue.svg)

Price changes are automatically reflected in Roofr

![Included](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852e6d8_fi_check-blue.svg)

Set default branches for real-time pricing

![Included](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852e6d8_fi_check-blue.svg)

Cut out duplicate work

[Get started](https://app.roofr.com/dashboard/settings/integrations) [Get more info](https://roofr.com/qxo-talk-to-an-expert)

![Screenshot of the dashboard showing QXO updated costs.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6839eddae6cdc2208b84285c_qxo-roofr-2.webp)

## Reports trusted by thousands of roofers

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/68d573ea580a90626c402f70_automations-icon.svg)

Step 1

### Order report

Order a $13 report in seconds on your dashboard, our team takes care of the rest!

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/68d573ea580a90626c402f70_automations-icon.svg)

Step 2

### Review & convert to proposal

Review your detailed report, and convert it into a custom proposal in a click.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/68d573ea580a90626c402f70_automations-icon.svg)

Step 3

### Close job & order materials

Order materials from your supplier in minutes to be delivered directly to the job site.

[Order a FREE report](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#free-report)

View sample report

[View sample report](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852ea1f_Roofr%20Report%20-%20Sample%20Report.pdf)

![A collection of Roofr Reports displaying detailed roofing measurements, material estimates, and property information in a structured format.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/66e495d55482fadc8fb691ba_Reports%20Ex.avif)

## Measurement reports in hours, not days

Our Roofr Reports can be ordered from anywhere in less than 60 seconds and delivered in as little as 2 hours.

Our Roofr Reports include detailed reports on length measurement, area measurement, pitch and direction, all structures summary, a diagram and more.

Pay as You Go

$19/report

ready in

24 hours

Pro Plan

$13/report

ready in

6 hours

Premium Plan

$13/report

ready in

3 hours

Elite Plan

$13/report

ready in

2 hours

[Order a FREE report](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#free-report)

View sample report

[View sample report](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852ea1f_Roofr%20Report%20-%20Sample%20Report.pdf)

## Accurate, fast, easy to use

We know accuracy is important to you. That’s why we pride ourselves on a multi-check system, up to date imagery, and a stellar calculation formula. If something isn’t accurate, we’ll make it right.

Fun Fact: One [Roofr customer](https://roofr.com/reviews) compared our measurement reports to their hand measurements, and found we were more accurate (seriously)!

[Order a FREE report](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#free-report)

View sample report

[View sample report](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852ea1f_Roofr%20Report%20-%20Sample%20Report.pdf)

![A satellite view of a property with a Roofr Report overlay, showing length measurement details, property data, and a pin confirming the roof location.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/66f32a1e7bf17623206499ad_measurements-2.avif)

![Material estimate for roofing at 3696 Walnut Brook Drive, Rochester Hills, Michigan, listing products, units, and quantities across different waste percentages.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/68f92b9573e7a561529abe01_measurements-4.avif)

## Never calculate materials, ever again

You have better things to do than waste time calculating the exact materials you need for a job. That’s why we created an option for you add a materials estimate to your Roofr Report - so you don’t need to calculate your materials ever again.

The best part? You get this free of charge on any of our subscription plans, and only costs $5 extra on our Pay as You Go plan!

[Order a FREE report](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#free-report)

View sample report

[View sample report](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852ea1f_Roofr%20Report%20-%20Sample%20Report.pdf)

## Measure yourself for instant results

Our DIY Reports tool is fast, easy to use, and allows you to measure roofs on your own time. Choose from our aerial images or upload your own to create quick measurements at a fraction of the cost of any other tool on the market.

That means for as little as $3.50 a report, you can measure and quote before you even leave the job site.

[Order a FREE report](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#free-report)

View sample report

[View sample report](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852ea1f_Roofr%20Report%20-%20Sample%20Report.pdf)

![A Roofr roof measurement tool highlighting various roof sections with labeled dimensions and color-coded edges for precise calculations.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/66f32a57e62fbf3393c7a36d_Group%20203.avif)

![A Roofr Report Summary showing an overview of multiple buildings on a property, including total roof area, predominant pitch, and measurement breakdowns.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/66cf2dd7bf18c7280d2fb8c3_Report.avif)

## Lightning fast, 2 hour turnarounds for Elites

Elite subscribers have exclusive, unlimited access to 2 hour Roofr Report turnaround times.

That’s right! Get your reports back in lightning speed, guaranteed in 2 hours or it’s free. That way, you can send out a proposal to your customer before your competition even gets their report back.

[Order a FREE report](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#free-report) [Compare plans](https://roofr.com/pricing)

## Tools proven to win more jobs

[Job Management](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-0) [Instant Estimator](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-1) [Measurement Reports](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-2) [Proposals](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-3) [Material Ordering](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-4) [Invoicing](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-5) [Payments](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-6) [Calendar](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-7) [Signatures](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-8)

[**Job tracking** \\
Stay organized and up to date on all the jobs in your pipeline. Job boards make it easy to know what’s on track and what needs attention.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-1-data-w-pane-0) [**Automated workflow** \\
Automate your processes to save time, reduce errors, and keep your team on track. Work more efficiently with the peace of mind nothing will be missed.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-1-data-w-pane-1) [**Team collaboration** \\
Stay on the same page with the whole team working seamlessly one place. Assign tasks, write notes, and track job activity for instant updates.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-1-data-w-pane-2) [**Performance tracking** \\
Get visibility into your lead quality, sales close rate, revenue, team performance, (and more) with real-time data from your job pipeline.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-1-data-w-pane-3)

![Dashboard interface showing a project management board with columns New Lead, Appt. Scheduled, Proposal Sent, and Pre-Production, each containing job cards with addresses, task statuses, and report statuses.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dacf2368e39dd7168dd9_graphic-tab-roofr-crm-1.webp)

![CRM software Automations tab showing toggled tasks for job stages lead qualified and appointment booked with options to edit and add automation.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dccbcaebdccacdbc54b4_graphic-tab-roofr-crm-3.webp)

![Job details interface showing assignee Rebecca Law, stage Appt. Scheduled, job value $10,450, source Instant Estimator - Website, and a note from Olivia Lichstein about over-ordered red metal sheets with a suggestion for better pricing.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dac730d147b09e0bcf50_graphic-tab-roofr-crm-2.webp)

![Dashboard showing lead performance with lead sources and stats, job values bar with won and lost amounts, and jobs metrics bar chart with totals and averages.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dacfc1b75517f1bb71c8_graphic-tab-roofr-crm-4.webp)

[**Lead capture** \\
Turn generic contact forms into instant roof quotes that capture leads. Collect and manage your lead details directly in Roofr, to win the job faster.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-2-data-w-pane-0) [**Marketing optimization** \\
Capture leads from anywhere, not just a form on your website. Turn all your marketing - ads, door hangers, business cards - into lead capture forms.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-2-data-w-pane-1) [**Lead qualification** \\
Capture important project details and skip the back and forth with homeowners. Quickly qualify and prioritize leads to improve your close rate.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-2-data-w-pane-2) [**Customer experience** \\
Stand out from your competitors by delivering value faster. Build trust with homeowners by offering estimate options up front and on their own time.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-2-data-w-pane-3)

![Online form titled 'Your instant estimate is one click away' requesting name, email, phone, project details, and consent for communication, next to a New Lead list showing addresses and report statuses like 'Report in Progress' and 'Report Cancelled'.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad39b92a0d108126300_graphic-tab-instant-estimator-1.webp)

![Website and promotional materials for Best Roofing Company showing a house and text offering trusted roofing services and free estimates with QR codes.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad390016c06c0095b0e_graphic-tab-instant-estimator-3.webp)

![Two mobile screens from Best Roofing Company: one asks for address with a satellite roof image, the other asks for roof type with images of asphalt, metal, tile, and cedar roofs.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad3133cc49786821a95_graphic-tab-instant-estimator-2.webp)

![Roofing estimate review page with two options: Classic Shingles priced $19,893-$21,839 with a house image, and Clay Tiles at $245 per month with a red tile roof image; includes project manager Rick Capo's profile with contact details and a photo.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad390016c06c0095b0b_graphic-tab-instant-estimator-4.webp)

[**Digital aerial measurements** \\
Order reports from anywhere by typing in the address and hitting send. Detailed reports are sent right to your inbox, so you can measure more roofs in less time.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-3-data-w-pane-0) [**Instant proposals** \\
Convert your Roofr Reports into proposals with a click. Measurements and materials are automatically converted into a digital proposal with your branding and prices.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-3-data-w-pane-1) [**Comprehensive reports** \\
Each report is a flat rate of $13 and includes all structures at the address, measurements, material calculations and recommended waste factor.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-3-data-w-pane-2) [**DIY reports** \\
Use our easy online tool to draw roof measurements yourself and instantly convert them into professional measurement reports.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-3-data-w-pane-3)

![Aerial view of a suburban neighborhood with a red location pin marking a house roof and an overlay displaying roof measurements and specifications.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad3176384dc821ad21b_graphic-tab-measurement-reports-1.webp)

![Screenshot of a Roofr measurement report selection interface with three addresses listed, showing a loading indicator calculating quantities, and a proposal summary with itemized roof repair and materials costs totaling $2,057.00.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dacffe65975eadcf193a_graphic-tab-measurement-reports-3.webp)

![Three overlapping roofing report pages showing a satellite roof image, structure summary with roof schematic, and a material estimate table.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad3efa6750f73eea441_graphic-tab-measurement-reports-2.webp)

![Aerial view of a building roof with various edges marked and color-coded by type such as eaves, valleys, hips, ridges, and rakes, along with measurements in feet displayed on the roof sections.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad3cb6be3f00f877dfc_graphic-tab-measurement-reports-4.webp)

[**Dynamic digital proposals** \\
Create and update proposals from anywhere, whether it’s your desk or in the field. Changes are made in real-time to save time on admin and get signatures faster.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-4-data-w-pane-0) [**On the spot e-signatures** \\
Create unlimited e-signatures so everyone who needs to sign, can sign quickly from their own device. There’s no extra cost and no need to switch softwares.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-4-data-w-pane-1) [**Customizable templates** \\
Customize your templates with your own branding and easy select pricing options like discounts, Good/Better/Best pricing, and upgrades.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-4-data-w-pane-2) [**Activity tracking** \\
Track your proposal activity to know when they’ve been sent, received, and opened so you can follow up faster and spend less time chasing down updates.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-4-data-w-pane-3)

![Roofing proposal editing screen showing customer and cosigner details, cover photo options with roof images, and a draft customer proposal page with roofing company logo and contact information.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad3c130fce409dca55c_graphic-tab-proposals-1.webp)

![Digital signature interface showing a subtotal of $5,000, tax at 15% as $750, and total $5,750, with a signature box signed Robert Gates and a Confirm and send button.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad35ff59e7058349d2f_graphic-tab-proposals-3.webp)

![Two overlayed estimate tabs showing discounts and upgrades for roofing services including labor, materials, warranty, and attic fan with prices and totals.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad3d126e92647d5d478_graphic-tab-proposals-2.avif)

![Three property cards showing addresses and proposal statuses: 'Proposal Sent' at 13790 Marine Drive with $21,000, 'Proposal Signed' at 302 Fairmont Ave with $18,400, and 'Proposal Draft' at 115 Bellefair Ave, all in Toronto, Ontario.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad34f898efdb5fa38fc_graphic-tab-proposals-4.webp)

[**Standardized material orders** \\
Never start from scratch again. Quickly create material orders from auto-populated customer details and quick select supplier information.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-5-data-w-pane-0) [**Easy tracking** \\
Manage your orders in the dashboard to know what’s been sent and what’s been filled, and stay up to date at a glance on your job record.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-5-data-w-pane-1) [**Instant email sending** \\
Create and send material orders from your Roofr account to streamline your process and make sure nothing slips through the cracks.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-5-data-w-pane-2) [**Automated workflow** \\
Quickly convert won proposals into material orders with a click by importing line items and prices. Now teams can work seamlessly together in one place.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-5-data-w-pane-3)

![Screenshot of a material order form for Ray's Roofing Pros showing supplier, branch location, materials (GAF Shingles, 24 qty at $25 each), total cost $1,200, and delivery details.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad3176384dc821ad1dd_graphic-tab-material-ordering-1.webp)

![Two task cards showing project statuses with addresses in Houston, Texas; one card shows 'Materials Draft' status and the other shows 'Materials Sent' status circled in blue.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad4b63d07a2d09fe092_graphic-tab-material-ordering-3.webp)

![Digital interface showing a material order form for A&M Roofing with delivery details, contact info, itemized materials, and a confirmation popup stating 'Sent! Your material order has been successfully sent.'](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad4c1b75517f1bb73ad_graphic-tab-material-ordering-2.webp)

![User interface showing an 'Import line items' summary with itemized material order details and a 'Select a proposal' popup listing two proposals from Houston, Texas, with options to view or continue.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad4165bb3e8e7baba32_graphic-tab-material-ordering-4.webp)

[**Integrated proposals** \\
Offer a seamless customer experience by converting signed proposals into invoices. Directly import line items and pricing for consistency and transparency.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-6-data-w-pane-0) [**Dashboard & status updates** \\
The dashboard helps you prioritize urgent invoices and know when to follow up with customers who are behind on payments.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-6-data-w-pane-1) [**Track and record payments** \\
Easily collect and record payments directly on the invoice to reduce errors, consolidate paperwork, and know what’s still outstanding.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-6-data-w-pane-2) [**One software for everyone** \\
Anyone can create invoices in Roofr so there’s no need to rely on one person, switch back and forth from platforms, or pay for extra software seats.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-6-data-w-pane-3)

![Invoice import interface showing line items with GAF shingles, wall flashing, and steel valley fishing priced at $25 each, quantities, margins, and total amounts, alongside a proposal selection popup listing two Houston, Texas addresses with $10,350 bids marked as won.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad4fe65975eadcf1ae2_graphic-tab-invoicing-1.webp)

![Two invoicing status cards showing addresses, client names, task progress, and payment statuses with one card indicating an invoice past due warning in red and the other showing an invoice paid status in green.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad4edd97458ed82c7bf_graphic-tab-invoicing-3.webp)

![Invoice from Ray's Roofing Pros showing $15,000 due by May 23rd, 2023, job and billing address at 674 Chancery Lane, invoice items including GAF Marathon 3-Tab Shingle and wall flashing, with options to record payment and preview invoice.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad4bda99939c269a71c_graphic-tab-invoicing-2.webp)

![Invoice list showing one draft invoice #1293820329 with $18,000 balance due and total, dated 08/09/2023, and a blue 'Create Invoice' button circled with an arrow pointing to it.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad40944b643a8165b31_graphic-tab-invoicing-4.webp)

[**Digital payment processing** \\
Offer homeowners the option to make online payments through credit card or ACH/EFT transfers, from their own devices.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-7-data-w-pane-0) [**No hidden fees** \\
There’s no cost to sign up for Roofr payments, no minimum spends and competitive processing fees help you protect your margins.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-7-data-w-pane-1) [**Secure payments in Roofr** \\
Sign up and manage your payments directly in Roofr for peace of mind when it comes to your money. Trust the same team you trust with everything else.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-7-data-w-pane-2) [**Integrated invoices** \\
Roofr Payments let’s you send payment requests with your invoices so homeowners can settle up on the spot, from their own devices.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-7-data-w-pane-3)

![Payment form with Credit Card tab selected showing fields for cardholder name, credit card number, expiry date, CVV, and zip code, with $15,000 payment amount and Cancel and Pay Now buttons.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad4d1eca6e12e687ffc_graphic-tab-payments-1.webp)

![Credit Card Fees: 2.8% plus 30 cent transaction fee for Mastercard, Visa, and Discover cards; Bank Debit and ACH Transfer Fees: 0.5% with a $40 transaction cap.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad4637509d7cbc8baf9_graphic-tab-payments-3.webp)

![Payments dashboard showing a list of customer payments with dates, names, invoice numbers, amounts, credit card payment method, payment status, and funding status.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad52fa76e6ce43fefd6_graphic-tab-payments-2.webp)

![Online payment settings for an invoice with credit card and ACH accepted, requesting 20% of $17,850 due by May 1, 2024, with Send Invoice and Cancel buttons.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6654dad45c5777ef1ef3087c_graphic-tab-payments-4.webp)

[**Schedule and manage work** \\
Events are connected to job records, for full visibility into tasks, deadlines, and milestones.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-8-data-w-pane-0) [**Better collaboration** \\
Keep your entire team informed —from sales to production—on what’s happening and when.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-8-data-w-pane-1) [**Time-saving automations** \\
Automatically update homeowners when events are scheduled, changed, or coming up.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-8-data-w-pane-2) [**Track availability** \\
Manage one calendar for all of your team’s work with smart filters, event types and custom views.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-8-data-w-pane-3)

![A digital calendar interface displaying scheduled events for a week. The calendar shows different colored blocks representing tasks like "Sales team meeting. Each event block is labeled with time slots and titles, illustrating a busy schedule.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/678e66f974f82c01edb98c51_calendar-1.avif)

![A detailed event creation interface showcasing fields for event details like title, date, time, and location. The interface also displays a list of invitees with checkboxes for selection. On the right, a summary of the event includes relevant details like the address and participants.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/678e672217b57879096b076e_calendar-3.avif)

![An interactive interface for setting up event reminders. The panel shows options for defining conditions like event types ("Roof install," "Roof repair") and associated actions such as "Check with Bill" or "Order a measurement report." Reminder triggers include time-based settings like "1 week before event starts."](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/678e671b707addeccd629ad3_calendar-2.avif)

![Another view of a digital calendar interface showing a week with time slots populated by events in different colors. Tasks are marked with their duration, showing a mix of personal and work-related events, such as "Visit Joe" and "Production." The clean design emphasizes schedule clarity.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/678e67292948adbb1fd4b5cc_calendar-4.avif)

[**Send PDFs for signature** \\
Upload, add signature fields, and send — all inside Roofr. Keep important paperwork linked to each job.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-9-data-w-pane-0) [**Streamlined workflow** \\
Send contracts, inspection reports, or certificates during sales, production, and payment — all within your job workflow.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-9-data-w-pane-1) [**Real-time tracking** \\
Track when documents are sent, opened, and signed right inside Roofr. Eliminate manual follow-ups and stay one step ahead with live updates synced directly to the job card.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-9-data-w-pane-2) [**Save time & money** \\
Forget juggling other subscriptions. Signatures is included with Elite subscriptions, giving you powerful document management without the extra fees or manual uploads.](https://roofr.com/qxo/measurements#w-tabs-9-data-w-pane-3)

![A PDF document editor interface showing a contingency agreement from Timmerman Industries. On the right, a panel labeled “Insert fillable fields” offers options for Signature, Initials, Text, and Checkbox fields. The document content is displayed on the left, with the company logo and contact information at the top.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/682e0f8f8488b104541ffde6_Frame%2048096554.webp)

![A two-panel interface for setting up and linking documents. The left panel shows a list of uploaded documents such as Contingency Agreement and Inspection Report. The right panel displays a list of job addresses and contact names to link the selected document to a job.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/682e0f8547982ad4728e1767_Frame%2048096554.webp)

![A status table displaying a list of documents with columns for status (Draft, Sent, Viewed, Completed), job address, customer name, document name, and date created. Each row uses colored icons to indicate the document’s current status.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/682e0f7dcc65eaf7c109cb42_Frame%2048096554.webp)

![A modal window titled “Add customer signature” with options to draw or type a signature. A drawn signature by “Joann Johnson” is shown. Below, a consent message explains that the signature will be used for legally binding documents, with “Cancel” and “Consent and sign” buttons at the bottom.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/682e0f7109bb4e3e8ff9b613_Frame%2048096554.webp)

## Have you met our @\*\#$ing amazing support team?

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/652ef410fe5b4562c14fcc50_fi_smile.svg)

13 minute average reply rate. Get answers fast.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/652ef410afeebcc64737ae73_fi_heart.svg)

90+% customer satisfaction rating

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/652ef40e0941ed09c5fe219e_fi_message-circle.svg)

Call us, chat with us, or email us. 7 days a week.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/652ef40e8e14ce26805170b7_Vector%20(50).svg)

Master the platform with unlimited onboarding calls\*.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/652ef41107d8d95c704391d4_fi_user.svg)

Dedicated Account Manager\* that’s ready to help.

\*Available for paid subscribers.

[Talk to an expert](https://roofr.com/talk-to-an-expert)

![Mobile phone screen showing a woman with short dark hair, a striped shirt, and an orange scarf, labeled Michelle G., Support at Roofr, surrounded by headshots of four other people and icons for chat, call, and email.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/68cdbe97d5ab0709489deff8_michelle-roofr-support.avif)

100% accurate and never had a problem. I’m now using this for my second successful roofing business, and I couldn’t have done it without Roofr. Thank you!

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/693c550ce0f549fc0690d5b7_Stars%20horizontal.avif)

4.7/5

![Capterra Logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852e714_capterra.webp)

"The Instant Estimator makes it easier than ever to close more deals. It's like having a free virtual assistant!"

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/693c550ce0f549fc0690d5b7_Stars%20horizontal.avif)

4.7/5

![Capterra Logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852e714_capterra.webp)

## Join thousands of roofers who successfully streamline their sales process with Roofr

[Get started for free](https://app.roofr.com/register)

![a close up view of a metal roof](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/64a5d2f6d7949a4608ad7c36_footer-p-2000-min.webp)

web.title: Roof Measurement Tool & Software | Roofr
web.description: Our Roofr Reports include detailed reports on length measurement, area measurement, pitch and direction, all structures summary, a diagram and more.
web.markdown:
[![Roofr company logo with a white roof icon on a blue rounded square background next to the word 'roofr' in dark letters.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852e844_Roofr-Logo-Colour_Dark%402x.webp)![Roofr logo.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6703e6f537b701d10237be7d_Roofr%20Logo%20Full.svg)](https://roofr.com/)

## Because accuracy matters

![Roofr Measurement Reports.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/679d1413496d6c73654b5efe_REPORTS%20OG%20TAG.avif)

Roofr Reports: Full Roof Measurement Reports for Only $13

Roofr

0:00 / 0:00

[Order a FREE Roofr Report](https://app.roofr.com/register) [View sample report](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852ea1f_Roofr%20Report%20-%20Sample%20Report.pdf)

## Convert reports into won jobs

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/695d4dad756df63bf2fa6f44_file.svg)

Step 1

### Order Report

Order a report in seconds, and we’ll get it back to you in under 2 hours.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/695d4db27cfee55aeceffc63_file-text.svg)

Step 2

### Convert to propsal

Use templates to turn Roofr Reports into proposals in minutes.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/695c0db9500ede26df4ed796_check-circle.svg)

Step 3

### Win the job

Print or email proposals, and let homeowners sign online or in person.

[Order a FREE Roofr Report](https://app.roofr.com/register) [View sample report](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852ea1f_Roofr%20Report%20-%20Sample%20Report.pdf)

![Multi-page roofing report showing roofing material estimates, aerial roof photo, length measurements, pitch and direction diagram, area measurements, and structure summary for a house in Rochester Hills, Michigan.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/69405641e6929a385fbfa728_measurements-v2-group.avif)

It’s all connected

## Your foundation for everything

Roofr Reports are used to:

- Craft presentation-ready proposals
- Generate material ordering lists
- Calculate waste factor

Get the foundation right, so the rest of your job can run smoothly.

[Order a FREE Roofr Report](https://app.roofr.com/register) [View sample report](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852ea1f_Roofr%20Report%20-%20Sample%20Report.pdf)

Roofr on mobile

## Order reports from anywhere

On site and need answers fast? Order measurement reports as you need them, right from the field.

- Order in seconds from your phone
- Keep momentum with less to-dos later
- Convert to proposals and material orders faster

[Order a report now](https://app.roofr.com/register)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/69985ec1717873d1aa8bf6ee_PWA%20Mockup-measurements.avif)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/69985ec1239ab44e8669b5ed_PWA%20block_%20Measurements.avif)

Numbers you can trust

## Speed and accuracy in one

Every Roofr Report goes through multi-check system, up to date imagery, and calculation formula that makes sure you’re getting an accurate report.

Measure confidently so you can focus on what comes next.

[Order a FREE Roofr Report](https://app.roofr.com/register) [View sample report](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852ea1f_Roofr%20Report%20-%20Sample%20Report.pdf)

![A satellite view of a property with a Roofr Report overlay, showing length measurement details, property data, and a pin confirming the roof location.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/66f32a1e7bf17623206499ad_measurements-2.avif)

![Material estimate for roofing at 3696 Walnut Brook Drive, Rochester Hills, Michigan, listing products, units, and quantities across different waste percentages.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/68f92b9573e7a561529abe01_measurements-4.avif)

We’ll take care of it

## You’re too busy to calculate materials

Materials are calculated for you based on pitch, roofing squares, and your preferred waste factor. Get a fully populated list that makes material ordering super easy.

[Order a FREE Roofr Report](https://app.roofr.com/register) [View sample report](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852ea1f_Roofr%20Report%20-%20Sample%20Report.pdf)

DIY is always an option

## Measure it yourself

Prefer to create your own report? No problem.

Pull up imagery and measure roofs for yourself! This is a great option of you want to use drone photos, or for any new-build blueprints.

[Order a FREE Roofr Report](https://app.roofr.com/register) [View sample report](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852ea1f_Roofr%20Report%20-%20Sample%20Report.pdf)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/695d5166f3ec620830e9520f_Group%20202.avif)

![Two roof measurement report pages by Roofr; one shows an aerial photo of a property, the other displays a roof schematic with detailed measurements and waste percentage calculations.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/694057905bb06ccb753ccee6_measurements-v2-reports.avif)

Always faster than manual measurements

## Get it in 2 hours (or less)

All our subscribers are guaranteed to get their Roofr Reports in under 2 hours.

Craft a proposal and send it to your customer before your competition even starts to measure.

[Order a FREE Roofr Report](https://app.roofr.com/register) [Compare plans](https://roofr.com/pricing)

“100% accurate and never had a problem. I’m now using this for my second successful roofing business, and I couldn’t have done it without Roofr. Thank you!”

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/693c550ce0f549fc0690d5b7_Stars%20horizontal.avif)

4.7/5

![Capterra Logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852e714_capterra.webp)

“The Instant Estimator makes it easier than ever to close more deals. It's like having a free virtual assistant!”

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/693c550ce0f549fc0690d5b7_Stars%20horizontal.avif)

4.7/5

![Capterra Logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6493173e3cea69ef8852e714_capterra.webp)

## Join _thousands_ of roofers who successfully streamline their sales process with Roofr

[Get started for free](https://app.roofr.com/register)

![Black roof installation.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6493173e3cea69ef8852e657/6703f2cf0662b4dafbf25884_black-roof.avif)
